name: GOLFTEC KCK
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf training studio that provides data-focused instruction and club fitting services. They utilize advanced motion measurement technology like OPTIMOTION, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to help coaches identify swing issues and guide players through personalized improvement plans. The service is built on a structured lesson journey, with options for on-course application and ongoing coaching, targeting golfers seeking measurable skill improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors
Personalized lesson journeys and game plans for structured improvement
Expert PGA award-winning coaches providing personalized instruction

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors are used for fittings and lessons

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or borrow clubs provided by GOLFTEC for lessons and fittings.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, so outside food and drinks are likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: This is not applicable as GOLFTEC focuses on lessons, practice, and fittings rather than full course simulations.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior programs and instruction, making it suitable for young golfers to learn and improve their game.
